trends.title: AI Trend Report
trends.subtitle: Latest AI model releases, company news, papers, and key voices from SNS — all summarized in Korean. Curated bundle ships weekly (Phase 22' B plan).

gate.title: 4B+ model required
gate.body: The trend menu needs a 4B+ instruction-tuned model for Korean summarization. Install EXAONE 3.5 7.8B / Nemotron 3 Nano 4B / Gemma 3 4B / HCX-SEED 8B from the catalog.

cards.heading: This week's signal
cards.meta: Phase 22' v2.0 entry will replace this with live curated data (jsdelivr weekly). For now, preview the planned sources.

paper.title: Research papers — HF Daily + arXiv
paper.hint: AK's curation on HuggingFace + arXiv cs.LG/CL/AI/CV daily top 10. One-line Korean summary.

blog.title: Official AI company blogs
blog.hint: OpenAI / Anthropic / Google DeepMind / Meta AI / NVIDIA / Mistral via RSS. Korean companies (Naver Cloud / Kakao / LG AI) follow.

news.title: AI news media
news.hint: TechCrunch AI / The Verge / VentureBeat + Korean (THE AI / AI Times). Fair-use 1–2 sentence + source link.

video.title: YouTube AI channels
video.hint: 3Blue1Brown / Yannic Kilcher / Two Minute Papers / Sebastian Raschka. Daily YouTube Data API v3 polling.

sns.title: Key voices on SNS
sns.hint: Karpathy / Lilian Weng / Simon Willison personal blogs + Bluesky public.api. X (Twitter) excluded — ToS-conscious.

github.title: GitHub OSS trends
github.hint: Apache-2 / MIT + AI/LLM topic filter. LangChain / vLLM / Korean OSS surfaced.

bundle.heading: This week's curation
bundle.previewNote: Seed content for the v2.0 preview. Real curator GHA cron + jsdelivr propagate kicks in at v2.0.

datasets.heading: Dataset catalog
datasets.meta: Korean personas / RP fine-tune seeds / training datasets. After ADR-0061 + ADR-0062, real download IPC + 1-click RAG seed import will follow.
datasets.empty: Dataset catalog is empty. v0.3.0 will add registry-fetcher auto-refresh and more seeds.

summary.heading: Summarize with my model
summary.meta: Summarize the current trends-bundle curation in Korean using your local 4B+ model. Without a model, a placeholder shows. The same input is cached for 30 days.

installedDatasets.heading: My datasets
installedDatasets.empty: No imported datasets yet. Click 'Import this dataset' on a card above.
installedDatasets.deleteConfirm: Really delete? Embedding chunks will also be removed.

trends.footnote: This prototype is a pre-v2.0 placeholder. Real curated data ships weekly from lmmaster-trends-bundle (or v1.x in-repo prototype) → jsdelivr propagate → user PC. See docs/adr/0060-trend-report.md.

recommend.title: Recommended models
recommend.subtitle: Three picks that fit this machine. See more in the catalog.

scan.title: Recent self-scan
scan.empty: No scans yet. Start one from Diagnostics.

errors.path-denied: Can't import a path outside the workspace. Please choose a folder inside the workspace.
errors.path-traversal: Download blocked: the link contains an unsafe path. Please use a different URL.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.

crash.title: An unexpected error occurred
crash.body: An unexpected error occurred. Open Diagnostics for details.

workspaceSwitcher.triggerAria: {{name}} workspace — click to switch or create
workspaceSwitcher.empty: No workspaces yet. Want to create one?
workspaceSwitcher.descriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe what this workspace is for
workspaceSwitcher.deleteConfirmBody: We will clean up this workspace’s knowledge and custom models. Disk files are preserved — back them up if you may need them later. Proceed?

errors.duplicate: A workspace named ‘{{name}}’ already exists. Please choose a different name.
errors.empty: The name cannot be empty. Please enter a workspace name.
errors.notFound: We couldn’t find this workspace. Refreshing…
errors.cannotDeleteOnly: You can’t delete the last workspace. Create a new one first.

custom.title: Your custom models
custom.subtitle: Custom models you built in Workbench appear here.
custom.empty: No custom models yet. Build one in Workbench and it will show up here.

pathPicker.tokenUnknown: Selection not found — please pick again.

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.subtitle: Teach your documents to the model and search them quickly.

knowledge.title: Knowledge
knowledge.subtitle: We auto-chunk your documents so you can search them fast.

ingest.title: Ingest
ingest.subtitle: Point to a file or folder and we'll chunk and store it.

embeddingModels.title: Embedding models
embeddingModels.subtitle: Download a model for better search accuracy. We recommend models that work well with Korean.

bge-m3.name: bge-m3 (multilingual)
bge-m3.description: 1024-dim multilingual embedder. Great for mixed Korean/English content.

kure-v1.name: KURE-v1 (Korean specialized)
kure-v1.description: 768-dim Korean-specialized model. Best for Korean-heavy content.

multilingual-e5-small.name: multilingual-e5-small (lightweight)
multilingual-e5-small.description: 384-dim lightweight model. For fast indexing or low-end PCs.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: See which sites called which models, grouped by key.

empty.title: No keys issued yet
empty.body: Create a key on the API Keys screen.

eula.title: LMmaster End User License Agreement
eula.scrollToAccept: Read to the end to enable the accept button.
eula.decline.confirmBody: If you decline, you cannot use LMmaster. Exit the app?

telemetry.title: Anonymous usage stats
telemetry.description: Off by default. When enabled, only anonymous usage stats are sent. Prompts and model outputs are never transmitted. You can disable this at any time.
telemetry.privacyNote: The ID is per-PC and contains no personally identifying information.

errors.toggleFailed: Couldn't update the telemetry setting. Retry.

autoUpdate.title: Auto-update
autoUpdate.upToDate: You are on the latest version

beta.description: The beta channel ships new features earlier but may be less stable. You can switch back to stable any time.

manualMode.title: Manual updates only
manualMode.description: Auto-updates are paused for v0.0.x. Please grab the latest installer from GitHub Releases. We'll turn auto-updates back on starting with the production build.
manualMode.newVersionAvailable: v{{latest}} is out. Please grab it from GitHub.
manualMode.checkFailed: Check failed. Please verify your network connection.

pipelines.title: Pipelines (gateway filters)
pipelines.description: Pipelines run inline on every gateway request. Toggle them on or off.

piiRedact.name: PII redaction
piiRedact.desc: Automatically masks Korean RRN, phone, credit card, and email.

tokenQuota.name: Token quota
tokenQuota.desc: Tracks per-key token budgets and rejects over-quota requests.

observability.name: Observability log
observability.desc: Records request/response metadata in the diagnostics log.

promptSanitize.name: Prompt sanitization
promptSanitize.desc: Removes invisible control characters (zero-width / RTL overrides) from prompts.

audit.title: Recent audit log
audit.empty: Audit log is empty. Entries appear here as the gateway processes requests.

errors.toggleFailed: Could not change the filter setting. Retry?
errors.clearFailed: Could not clear the audit log

catalogRefresh.title: Auto catalog refresh
catalogRefresh.intervalHint: Auto-fetches every 6 hours. Only GitHub and jsDelivr are reached.
catalogRefresh.never: Never refreshed yet. We'll auto-fetch every 6 hours from now.
catalogRefresh.partial: Some manifests failed. We'll retry on the next refresh.
catalogRefresh.failed: All manifest fetches failed. Keeping the cached catalog.
catalogRefresh.errorRefresh: Couldn't trigger a refresh. Please try again.

advanced.sqlcipher.envHint: SQLCipher is enabled with a secret stored in the OS keychain. Falls back to plaintext when the keychain is unavailable.
advanced.llamaServer.hint: Required for vision chat. "Auto setup" downloads the right build for your GPU.

modelsExport.hint: Open the GGUF folder when moving models to a cloud GPU. For external (cellular) beta testing, run inference on a cloud GPU separately.
modelsExport.guideHint: RunPod / Vast.ai setup steps are in this guide:

lanGateway.hint: Off: only this PC's browser can call (default). On: other devices on the same LAN can call too. External internet / cellular cannot reach.
lanGateway.toggleLabel: Let other devices on this LAN call this LMmaster
lanGateway.companyPcWarning: On a company PC, check with your security team first. Some corporate network policies forbid exposing internal assets.
lanGateway.pendingRestart: Changes apply after the gateway restarts. Please close and reopen the app.
lanGateway.urlsEmpty: No LAN IP detected. This happens on VPN-only environments or when only virtual adapters are present.

artifacts.title: Workbench temporary files
artifacts.description: Quantize and LoRA artifacts. Older than 30 days or beyond 10 GB are auto-cleaned.
artifacts.loadFailed: Couldn't load usage. Try again later.

export.title: Export workspace
export.subtitle: Pack this workspace into a single zip file. Use this to back up or move to another PC.
export.targetHint: Use an absolute path. The filename should end with .zip.
export.includeModelsHint: Adds gigabytes. If off, the new PC can re-download from the catalog.
export.includeKeysHint: When enabled, keys are encrypted with a passphrase.
export.passphraseHint: At least 8 characters recommended. If lost, keys cannot be recovered.
export.running: Compressing. This may take a moment.

import.title: Import workspace
import.subtitle: Bring in a workspace zip from another PC.
import.selectFileHint: Enter the path to the .zip created by export.
import.running: Extracting. This may take a moment.

tier.green: Matches this PC. Ready to use.
tier.yellow: GPU or memory differs. You can re-run benchmarks.
tier.red: OS family differs. Some models need to be re-downloaded.

errors.emptySource: Please enter the path of the file to import.
errors.verify: Couldn't read the archive. Is the path correct?

runtimes.title: Runtimes
runtimes.subtitle: Status of runtimes on this machine.

install.title: Runtime install
install.subtitle: Pick one local AI engine to power your web app.

ollama.name: Ollama
ollama.reason: Fastest way to get started — open-source runtime

lmStudio.name: LM Studio
lmStudio.reason: Great if you want a GUI. Auto-install is not allowed; we open the official site for you (EULA policy).
lmStudio.license: EULA required · install from official site

openedUrl.title: {{name}} official site opened
openedUrl.body: Finish the install on the official site and LMmaster will pick it up automatically. If the page didn't open, copy the URL below and open it manually.
openedUrl.openFailed: Couldn't reopen the site. Please copy the URL and open it yourself.

empty.title: Both runtimes are ready
empty.body: Grab a model from the catalog.

promptTemplate.title: ① Prompt templates — start now
promptTemplate.subtitle: Examples you can use right away with this model. Click a card to copy the prompt.
promptTemplate.empty: No examples registered for this model yet.
promptTemplate.copied: Copied. Paste into the Chat page to use.
promptTemplate.advanceHint: When prompts alone aren't enough — fine-tune with LoRA for more accurate alignment.

ragSeed.title: ② Add your data (RAG) — optional
ragSeed.subtitle: Adding your domain documents helps the model understand your context. Turn this on when prompts alone aren't enough.
ragSeed.koRagTip: For Korean documents, the KURE-v1 embedder is most accurate. Enable it in Workspace > Embedding models.
ragSeed.visionDeferred: Image RAG arrives in the next version. For now only text documents (.txt / .md / .pdf) can be embedded.
ragSeed.pathHint: Text / Markdown / PDF files are auto-chunked and embedded.
ragSeed.noWorkspace: No active Workspace. Create one from the sidebar first.
ragSeed.startFailed: Failed to add documents. Please try again shortly.

hero.title: Forge your own model
hero.body: A 5-step workbench: LoRA-fine-tune on Korean data, quantize, and register to Ollama in one click.

config.datasetPathHint: Path to a JSONL file. Leave empty to dry-run with mock data.

data.title: 1. Pick your data
data.subtitle: We auto-normalize JSONL into chat messages. All four formats (OpenAI / ShareGPT / Alpaca / Korean Q&A) are supported.
data.previewError: Couldn't preview this file. Check the format.

quantize.title: 2. Shrink the model
quantize.subtitle: Pick a quantization level. Smaller numbers mean a lighter file with slightly less quality.
quantize.typeHint: Q4_K_M is usually the sweet spot.

lora.title: 3. Teach it Korean
lora.subtitle: LoRA fine-tunes the model lightly on your dataset.

validate.title: 4. Check the quality
validate.subtitle: We run 10 baseline Korean evals against your model.

register.title: 5. Register to Ollama
register.subtitle: We render an Ollama Modelfile. Toggle on to register automatically.

runtime.label: Validate runtime
runtime.hint: Pick the runtime to call during the Validate stage. Mock means no external calls (demo).
runtime.baseUrlHint: The default usually works. Change it only if the port differs.
runtime.modelIdHint: Ollama tag or LM Studio loaded model id. Leaving empty uses the base model name.
runtime.ollamaCreateToggle: Register to Ollama automatically when done

baseUrl.nonLocalhost: Only models running on this PC can be evaluated. Use a http://localhost URL.
baseUrl.httpsBlocked: Only http is supported. https targets external services and is blocked.

signature.title: Catalog signature
signature.empty: No verification result yet — refresh the catalog.
signature.failed: Signature verification failed: {{reason}}. Using bundled catalog for safety.
signature.missing: Signature file missing. Check the CI signing pipeline.
signature.bundled: Using bundled catalog — verification not applied (trusted at build time).

diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
diagnostics.subtitle: Check this machine's health at a glance.

crash.title: Crash reports
crash.subtitle: We log unexpected errors automatically. Most recent first.
crash.notInitialized: Crash directory not ready yet. Try restarting the app.

guide.title: Guide
guide.subtitle: Walkthroughs for the 6 core features of LMmaster
guide.noResults: No matches. Try a different keyword.

splash.subline: Runtimes · models · catalog converge in one place

help.workspace: Teach documents to the model and search them fast. Each workspace stays isolated.
help.workbench: Build models in 5 steps: Data → Quantize → LoRA → Validate → Register.
help.catalog: Auto-recommended models that fit your PC. Click a card for details.
help.apiKeys: Issue keys so external apps can call LMmaster. Set allowed models, origins, expiry.
help.portable: Export an entire workspace as one zip and re-import it on another PC.

tour.title: First time here?
tour.body: Take a quick tour of LMmaster's core features.

catalog.title: Model Catalog
catalog.subtitle: Pick a model that fits your machine.

refresh.title: Pulls the model catalog + Ollama / LM Studio version info in one shot. Auto-refresh every 6 hours; manual trigger also works.

card.startWorkbenchTitle: Start in Workbench with this model? Intent and model context travel together.

adultContent.toggleTitle: Choose the adult-content filter. Each click cycles: hide → show all → adult only. Default is hide.
adultContent.toggleAria: Adult content filter mode: {{mode}}. Click to advance.
adultContent.chipTitle: Adult content — visible because the filter is on

commercial.chipTitle: Non-commercial license — commercial use not allowed

empty.noMatch: No models match your filters. Adjust them and try again.
empty.category: No models in this category yet.

hfSearch.triggerTitle: Search HuggingFace directly. Unsupported models are flagged with a warning icon.
hfSearch.title: Found on HuggingFace
hfSearch.banner: Unsupported models are not verified for compatibility or Korean strength. Domain scores are not shown.
hfSearch.empty: No results. Try a different keyword.
hfSearch.errorGeneric: HuggingFace search failed. Please try again shortly.
hfSearch.registerError: Registration failed. Please try again shortly.

intent.heading: What kind of AI are you looking for?

empty.best: Nothing fits this machine. Start with the lightweight option.

install.done: Done. Want to run the 30-second measure?
install.lmsRedirect: LM Studio downloads happen inside its app. Search the model name there to find it.

repair.yellow: First run on this machine. Re-measuring bench and scan caches.
repair.redBody: OS or architecture changed. Reinstall existing runtimes to continue.

migrating.fail: Could not encrypt the key vault. A backup is safe at: {{path}}

fallback.headless: Keychain unavailable — using plaintext storage. Desktop sessions will encrypt automatically.

keys.title: Local API Keys
keys.subtitle: Auth tokens for web apps calling this machine's models.

actions.revokeConfirm: Revoke this key? Revoked keys stop working immediately.

empty.title: No keys yet
empty.body: Create a key to connect a web app.

modal.aliasLabel: Alias (so you can spot the use site)

network.legend: Where will this key be called from?

localhost.title: This PC only
localhost.hint: Only browsers/tools on this PC can call. Safest.

lan.title: LAN (same WiFi/wired network)
lan.hint: Coworker PCs and phones on the same LAN can call.

any.title: Anywhere (you set up an external tunnel)
any.hint: Use cloudflared/ngrok yourself. LMmaster only issues the key.
any.warning: Tunnel setup and key exposure are your responsibility. On a company PC, check with your security team first.

modal.originHint: The key works only from this exact origin. Add as many as you need.
modal.modelsHint: * matches every model; exaone-* matches the EXAONE family only.

models.selectAll: All — also auto-allow models installed later
models.selectAllHint: Uncheck to pick from installed models below.
models.empty: No models downloaded yet. Pull one from the catalog first.

advanced.originHint: Empty: callable from any origin. Specify exact URLs to restrict.

modal.revealBody: You won't see this again. Copy it somewhere safe.

guide.title: How to use this key
guide.anyNote: Set up your own external tunnel (cloudflared/ngrok) and use that URL. LMmaster only issues the key.
guide.maskedNote: Once the key is masked, paste the original key into the <키> placeholder before running. Copy it before it masks.

pipelines.useGlobalHint: Checked: this key inherits the Settings → Pipelines toggles. Unchecked: the boxes below become an explicit allowlist.
pipelines.warningEmpty: Disabling all checkboxes means no filters are applied to calls from this key. Not recommended for production.

errors.emptyModels: Pick at least one model. Toggle 'All' to allow every model.
errors.emptyScope: Keep at least one model or endpoint pattern. An empty scope blocks every call.

editModal.title: Edit filters
editModal.subtitle: Update filters without re-issuing the plaintext key. Alias and ID stay the same.

bench.wallclockHint: LM Studio doesn't expose precise token counters, so this is an estimate.

error.modelNotLoaded: Model isn't loaded in the runtime.
error.insufficientVram: Too heavy for this machine ({{need}} needed, {{have}} available).

palette.empty: No matches. Try a different keyword.

subtitle.done: Check complete. Review the results below.

body.noGpu: No GPU found. CPU mode still works.

hint.lowRam: Under 8GB of RAM. Larger models may struggle.
hint.lowDisk: Under 20GB free disk. Free up space before downloading.

install.title: Set up a runtime
install.subtitle: Ollama is recommended. Pick one — grab models later from the catalog.
install.ramLowHint: Under 8GB of RAM. Smaller models recommended.

ollama.reason: Fastest way to get started — open-source runtime

lmStudio.reason: Great if you want a GUI. Auto-install is not allowed; we open the official site for you (EULA policy).

openedUrl.title: Site opened
openedUrl.body: Finish the install on the official site, then come back here.

error.download-failed: Download failed. Check your network and retry.
error.open-url-failed: Couldn't open browser. Open the site manually.
error.invalid-spec: Manifest is malformed. Report this issue.
